role: Operations Analyst at a B2B SaaS (North America focus)

python_experience.charting_level: Can script basic line/bar charts; limited interactivity; minimal experience with Plotly and Dash

data_storytelling_experience: Limited; tends to overload charts with data; struggles to frame a clear narrative and tighten takeaways for executives
business_problem: Leadership needs a weekly revenue and retention dashboard for the North America segment with executive-friendly visuals and short commentary
motivations: Need to present a dashboard to VP Ops by end of quarter
Desire to move from 'analyst producing charts' to 'analyst driving decisions'
accountability_preference: Weekly public update in team Slack; peer buddy for quick reviews
learning_preferences: Checklists and templates over long theory
assumptions: Ok to start with CSV-file ingestion; APIs can be a stretch goal
Security allows internal-only demo during Week 4
